title: caryocar glabrum subsp. parviflorum
intro: Caryocar glabrum subsp. parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered guanacaste, is a plant species in the family Caryocaraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage. Caryocar glabrum subsp. parviflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
